exact_next_action: Emit Foundry import for mission-recommendation-hardening-31 and execute exactly one active node.
blueprint_boundary: Blueprint only when new authorization or governed planning is required.
foundry_boundary: Foundry for ready bounded implementation selected by Atlas.

roles.name: AO Mission
roles.use_when: Use for the operator-facing loop that starts, resumes, and closes supervised hardening waves.

roles.name: AO Atlas
roles.use_when: Use for workgraph state, next-node continuation, durable checkpoints, and multi-repo sequencing.

roles.name: AO Blueprint
roles.use_when: Use for new authorization, new requirements, or a new governed plan.

roles.name: AO Foundry
roles.use_when: Use for ready bounded implementation after Atlas selects exactly one executable node.
roles.boundary: implementation, verification, PR, CI, merge, and cleanup evidence

roles.name: AO Promoter
roles.use_when: Use for promotion or no-promotion verdict evidence.

roles.name: AO Command
roles.use_when: Use for readback agreement, exact next action, compact timeline, and final-response state.

roles.name: AO Sentinel
roles.use_when: Use for public-safety wording scans, stale risk wording, and forbidden claim detection.

roles.name: AO Architecture
roles.use_when: Use for capability map, system boundary, and cross-component architecture evidence.
